title: 英文作文求Level 5, 求狠批

replies.msg:
Question : Your class has set up a group on Whatsapp, an instant messaging app, where classmates can discuss their views on school-related issues. Your principal is supportive of this move and he has invites you to write an article for the school newsletter about it. In your article, describe how it benefits both the teachers and students, what problems there can be and how we can solve them.


---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Embracing new technology for teaching


Recently, a secondary 6 class in our school has set up a group for discussing school-related issues on Whatsapp, an instant messaging app. Some say that is is a very good idea of using new technology for teaching purposes, others think that it brings numerous of problems. The question is not how much disadvantages technology brings ti students and teachers, but is there a limit of beneficial ways of technology that we can think of.

First and foremost, everybody know knows that using instant messaging app breaks the time and locational constraints of traditional means of teaching. One example of it is that there have been a new way for teaching called an 'Upside down classroom'. The meaning of it is that teachers can upload videos of them teaching a new topic so that students can learn the topic at home. When students are back at school, they can jump right into a more in-depth view of the topic which boosts teaching progress. Uploading teaching videos onto Whatsapp or other messaging apps means students with slower leaning speed can rewatch the video until they get a hang on the basics of the topic. With the needs of different students taken care of and a faster teaching progress, it is a must that teachers and students can benefit from using instant messaging app to discuss school-related issues.

Other than teaching students is a more efficient manner, teachers and students can also benefit from messaging groups owing to the fact that students can get individual help much more easily than before. Before having the instant-messaging groups, the only way of communication between teachers and students is by way of making phone calls. If students have problems concerning school works, it was very difficult for teacher to explain complicated issues like chemistry equations or math solutions to the students. These days, with instant messaging groups between teacher and students, teachers can offer help to students not only by voice messages, they can also simply send a picture to the student explaining the issus. Therefore, the use of Whatsapp group between teachers and students is clearly beneficial to their after school tuition.

In addition to the teaching side of benefits, a Whatsapp group between teachers and students also allow information to be delivered much more quickly than before. Take the heavy rainstorm happened last month as an example. That day, a black rainstorm warning was issued by the Hong Kong Observatory at 7:45 a.m. which means students should stay at home rather than going to school. However, there would definitely be insufficient time for teachers to call each student about the news. With the Whatsapp group, teachers can simply send one message and every student would get notified instantly. To make it simple, Whatsapp group lets teachers to notice students quicker thatn before in some emergent occasion which would surely bring goods to both teachers and students.

A Whatsapp group can surely benefit students and teacher is many ways, but what about the problems it brings?

One obvious problem a Whatsapp group brings to teachers and students is that they have to think of school work even when they are having their private time. A simple solution to that is to let teachers and students to choose whether or not they want to reply the message. For more hard-working students, they can step up their learning after school be asking teachers questions.

未完，打埋先。

呢篇係學校考試作嘅，絕對係2個鐘作曬

Giving the freedom of replying messages or not fulfils both students with higher aims and students who want to maintain their work-life balance.

In addition to the issus of work-life balance, the problem of disclosing their own personal details is also considerable. Some teachers might be afraid that giving their phone numbers to at least a few dozens of students will lead to a danger of their private information being leaked. Teachers who are afraid that their phone number being discloused can choose to buy a cheap phone dedicated for answering students' questions. This way, teachers can separate the messages sent by their friends and family and the messages sent by their students. By using a separate phone number for school works allow the teachers to either focus on working or focus on their personal life and do no need to be afraid of disclosing their personal information to a large number of students.

In conclusion, the fact that teachers and students can teach and learn more efficiently, give individual student extra help in better quality and deliver information quicker in emergent occasion makes a Whatsapp group between teachers and students a brilliant way to discuss school-related issues. Sure enough, there are definitely more advantages than disadvantages.

------完------

1) 其實英文勁嘅唔會特登記住要用pattern，求其寫幾句已經有幾個patterns, 如果你真係健忘，可以寫幾個熟嘅sentence pattern係隔離提自己用(我覺得咋下，但未聽過有人咁做)。最重要: 唔好格硬用pattern，否則好肉酸，扣印象分。至於每個pattern點用，google大把。

2) connective真係靠平時作。去到咩位用however ，咩位用nonetheless，咩位用in contrat真係自動波。時間緊迫，最好記synonyms 去增加字詞diversity，eg: also --> in addition/additionally, what is more, as well etc。同一字唔好成日重用，詞窮好肉酸。盡量避免moreover，furthermore等極formal 嘅 connectives ( depends on 文體) 。

3)唔記得自己寫幾多，唔好寫少point，最好有正反，point個structure(簡易版): topic sentence--> description + 扣題 --> explanation --> give eg when appropriate + conclusion。寫夠、齊就停，多啲時間諗好個flow/organization/synonyms好過。point要comprehensive 之餘，整體對題目探究都要thorough。 organization係攞分位。包括段內嘅organization同成篇嘅flow，logically 就 1)intro 2)background 3-5) 正points 6)反points，當然唔同題目唔同，不過大致上係咁。
